items.title: Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes
items.dek: Drones targeted Wildberries facilities near Moscow and in Tambov. Ukraine's leader called them "major logistics facilities" supplying "sanctioned components".
items.body: Drones targeted Wildberries facilities near Moscow and in Tambov. Ukraine's leader called them "major logistics facilities" supplying "sanctioned components".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Laos says it can't determine cause of tourist deaths linked to methanol
items.dek: Officials say they have no evidence of poisoning over the 2024 deaths because autopsies were not conducted.
items.body: Officials say they have no evidence of poisoning over the 2024 deaths because autopsies were not conducted.
items.author: IriLine Desk
